# SEC Filings Downloader - Project Setup

This is a React + Vite web application for searching and downloading SEC EDGAR 10K and 10Q filings.

## Setup Progress

- [x] Scaffold the Vite React project
- [x] Install dependencies  
- [x] Create core components (CompanySearch, FilingsList, etc.)
- [x] Integrate with SEC EDGAR API
- [ ] Test and compile
- [x] Prepare for running

## Features
- Search companies by ticker symbol or name
- Display available 10K and 10Q filings
- Download files directly to user's computer
- Client-side processing (no backend required)
